nasb.text: “As for you, son of man, describe the temple to the house of Israel, that they may be ashamed of their iniquities; and let them measure the plan.

esv.text: “As for you, son of man, describe to the house of Israel the temple, that they may be ashamed of their iniquities; and they shall measure the plan.

cnv.text: “人子啊！你要把這殿指示以色列家，使他們因自己的罪孽而羞愧，又要他們量度殿的尺寸。

ccb.text: “人子啊，你要向以色列人描述所看见的圣殿，让他们思考圣殿的设计，使他们为自己的罪恶而羞愧。
